mapper.insert: insert into counselor_ai_settings (counselor_id, enable_ai_scoring, ai_model_code, create_time, update_time) values (#{counselorId}, #{enableAiScoring}, #{aiModelCode}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select cas.*, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id, tu.teacher_type as tu_teacher_type from counselor_ai_settings cas left join teacher_users tu on cas.counselor_id = tu.id where cas.id = #{id}

select cas.*, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id, tu.teacher_type as tu_teacher_type from counselor_ai_settings cas left join teacher_users tu on cas.counselor_id = tu.id where cas.counselor_id = #{counselorId}
